title: Internationalized Next.js Application (next-intl)
description: Complete route for building a multi-language Next.js app with locale-based routing, JSON translation files, authentication with locale-aware redirects, database, and production deployment.

steps.description: Initialize Next.js with App Router and TypeScript
Configure Tailwind CSS v4 for styling
Add next-intl: locale routing, JSON message files, useTranslations hook, middleware locale detection
Add authentication with locale-aware sign-in redirects
Set up Prisma ORM for persisting user locale preferences
Unit testing with locale message mocking
CI/CD pipeline with TypeScript check and build
Deploy to Vercel with locale URL configuration and i18n headers
